description: BOYS JURASSIC WORLD BACKPACK Official Jurassic World merchandise exclusive to us. We have a full range of Jurassic World merchandise on our store. This backpack is designed for all fans of the movie series - Jurassic World continues to be a firm favourite. Every detail has been thought of on this luxury large bag. It is super stylish in a new season teal green colour and we have added the Jurassic World logo rubber stamp zip pulls and side mesh bottle holder. This bag also has an image of a T-Rex and the Indominus Rex in a raised 3D eva effect, along with the slogan "Welcome To Jurassic World". We even have claw marks all around the side panels to look just like the dinosaurs are trying to get out of the bag. Each bag measures an estimated 36cm x 30cm that can easily fit an A4 folder. A great bag that would make a great gift.
